data.title: LDC's 2025 report reveals ongoing underrepresentation of U.S. Latinos in media streaming, broadcast, and cable platforms.
data.description: In Los Angeles, LDC has published the 2025 U.S. Latinos in Media Report™, highlighting ongoing underrepresentation of Latinos across streaming, broadcast, and cable platforms. The report sheds light on the disparity in media representation, emphasizing the need for more inclusive portrayals. Key findings include significant underrepresentation of Latinos in both on-screen and off-screen roles. This report brings attention to the importance of diversity in media and calls for increased efforts to address the lack of representation.

data.title: Land & Buildings urges Six Flags to unlock real estate value in public letter to shareholders.
data.description: Stamford-based Land & Buildings Investment Management, a major shareholder of Six Flags Entertainment Corporation (NYSE: FUN), has released a public letter to the Company's shareholders outlining a plan for Six Flags to enhance its value. The letter proposes that Six Flags could benefit from monetizing its real estate assets and implementing operational improvements. Land & Buildings suggests that by pursuing these strategies, Six Flags has the potential to unlock significant value for its shareholders.

data.title: NETSTREIT Corp. secures $450M in additional financing, amends existing credit facilities with PNC Bank, Wells Fargo, and Truist.
data.description: Dallas-based NETSTREIT Corp. (NTST) revealed the finalization of an additional $450.0 million in funding, along with modifications to its current credit facilities managed by PNC Bank, Wells Fargo Bank, and Truist Bank. The financing includes a new Term Loan Credit Agreement led by PNC Bank.

data.title: Animal Rescue Corps saves 54 neglected pets in Gibson County, including 53 dogs and a cat, from inhumane conditions.
data.description: 53 dogs and a cat were rescued from deplorable conditions at a deteriorating mobile home in Nashville, Tennessee, as part of Animal Rescue Corps' Operation Dark Passage. The nonprofit organization revealed this on September 26, 2025.

data.title: Chijet Motor Co. is offering $20.0 million in private placement to non-U.S. institutional investors.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Chijet Motor Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: CJET) revealed its agreement with non-U.S. institutional investors for a private placement offer. This deal involves units comprising ordinary shares and warrants, aiming to raise a total of $20.0 million in proceeds.

data.title: Cybersecurity experts advise using AI to monitor North Korean hackers for enhanced wallet security in crypto firms.
data.description: According to cybersecurity experts, the implementation of AI threat detection systems and improved wallet management practices could potentially protect cryptocurrency companies from infiltration attempts by North Korean hackers. These measures are expected to significantly enhance the security of crypto firms against such threats.

data.title: Mobix Labs receives BAE Systems' Gold Tier Supplier Award for the second year, achieving zero defects and 100% on-time delivery.
data.description: For the second consecutive year, Mobix Labs has been recognized with the prestigious Gold Tier Supplier Award by BAE Systems. This award acknowledges the company's exceptional performance, including achieving zero defects, delivering products on time 100% of the time, and providing reliable defense support. This recognition underscores Mobix Labs' commitment to excellence and their strong partnership with BAE Systems.

data.title: Evkeeza ANGPTL3 antibody approved by FDA for kids as young as 1 with ultra-rare HoFH, extending its use.
data.description: Evkeeza has received FDA approval to expand its indication to include the treatment of younger patients diagnosed with homozygous hypercholesterolemia (HoFH). This extended approval allows the medication to be used in individuals who are under the age of 12 with HoFH, a genetic condition that results in extremely high levels of cholesterol. The approval provides a new treatment option for patients in this age group, offering them access to a potential solution for managing their condition.
